items.content_html:
Part1РђІ

FishingРђІ

  • Is fishing popular in your country?
    • popular, a lot of lakes and rivers, enjoy fishing there.
  • Do you like eating fish?
    • love sushi and sasimi, fish for dinner with ...
  • Have you ever been to a place where there are lots of fish around you?
    • Han River, a lot of small fish swimming in the river, didn't want to catch them, the water seemed dirty.
  • Have you seen any movies with lots of fish?
    • Finding nemo, tropical fishes.
  • Why do people go fishing?
    • enjoy the experience, eat the fish by cooking it

Part2РђІ

# Describe an activity you did with another person

- what the activity was
- where and where you did it
- who you did it with
- and why you chose that person

Riding a bike with my wife

Part3РђІ

  • Can you give some other examples of adventurous or risky activities?
    • I've had an adventurous activity
    • rode a transparent cable car, see everything on the ground.
    • a very adventurous experience, because I was scared, but I overcame my fear.
  • Why do some young people like adventurous activities?
  • Do older people like adventurous activities?
  • How do adventurous activities help people to relieve stress?
  • What skills do people need to take part in adventurous activities?
  • Why do young people like doing exciting things?
  • How does friendship affect peopleРђЎs overall well-being?

В░ИВА░РђІ

  • YourIELTS

Вё╣ВЁў4ьЋЎВѕавЈЁв░▒вЈЎВІЮвг╝, в╣ёВДђвІѕВіц, ВЌГВѓг

Ж│хвХђ в░Ев▓ЋРђІ

  • вЁ╣ВЮї
    • В▓Ф вгИВъЦ вДљьЋўЖИ░

Part1РђІ

  • Well, ВДЂВаЉВаЂВЮИ вІхв│ђ
  • This is because
  • One reason is that
  • In the case of ~
  • To be specific,
  • What I mean is that
  • For example,
  • In fact,

Do you ever?РђІ

  • ВіхЖ┤ђ ВДѕвгИВЮ┤вЮ╝ tend to, tend not to

Part2РђІ

  • ьѓцВЏївЊю, ВІюВаю ьїїВЋЁ

Part3РђІ
